_comment: UNTRANSLATED — copy of English strings; starting template for Portuguese translation.
config.enable_rotation_desc: When enabled, the rotation will automatically cast spells.
config.preset_tooltip: Presets quickly configure settings for different content types.
config.reset_question: Reset all settings to default values?
config.preserved_settings: Spell toggles and targeting preferences are preserved.
config.general.movement_tolerance_desc: How long to wait after movement stops before casting (seconds).
config.general.start_on_auto_attack_desc: When enabled, Daedalus starts executing the rotation as soon as auto-attack is active on a target, before the server sets the in-combat flag.
config.window.prevent_escape_close_desc: When enabled, pressing Escape will not close the Daedalus window.
config.window.show_during_cutscenes_desc: When enabled, Daedalus windows stay visible during in-game cutscenes.
config.overlay.show_mechanics_forecast_d: Displays upcoming fight mechanics (raidwides, tank busters, phases) with countdown timers in the overlay. Only visible when a fight timeline is loaded.
config.targeting.strategy_desc.lowest_hp: Target enemy with lowest HP (finish off weak enemies)
config.targeting.strategy_desc.highest_h: Target enemy with highest HP (for cleave/AoE)
config.targeting.strategy_desc.tank_assi: Attack what the party tank is targeting
config.targeting.strategy_desc.current_t: Use your current hard target if valid
config.targeting.strategy_desc.focus_tar: Use your focus target if valid
config.targeting.fallback_to_lowest_hp_d: If no tank target found, use Lowest HP instead.
config.targeting.movement_tolerance_desc: Delay after stopping before casting. Lower = faster, higher = safer.
config.role_actions.enable_esuna_desc: Automatically cleanse dispellable debuffs from party.
config.role_actions.enable_rescue_desc: Pulls party member to your position. Manual use only.
config.role_actions.rescue_warning: WARNING: Rescue can kill party members if misused!
config.resurrection.raise_mode_desc_bala: Raise in weave windows, don't interrupt healing
config.resurrection.raise_mode_desc_heal: Only raise when party HP is stable
config.resurrection.allow_hardcast_desc: Cast Raise without Swiftcast (8s cast). Use with caution.
config.resurrection.min_mp_for_raise_des: Minimum MP percentage before attempting to raise.
config.privacy.telemetry_desc: Only sends plugin version. No personal data.
config.damage.safe_to_attack_desc: Party HP threshold above which damage spells are used.
config.job.whm.cure_iii_desc: Targeted AoE heal (10y radius around target). Best when stacked.
config.job.whm.lily_heals_desc: Free heals that consume Lily gauge.
config.job.whm.ogcd_heals_desc: Instant heals used during weave windows.
config.job.whm.buffs_desc: Speed buff and MP cost reduction.
config.job.whm.aetherial_shift_desc: Gap closer (15y dash) when out of spell range.
config.job.whm.use_damage_based_triage_d: Prioritize healing targets taking active damage.
config.job.whm.enable_assize_for_healing: Use Assize as a healing oGCD when party needs it.
config.job.whm.enable_preemptive_healing: Heal before damage spikes land based on pattern detection.
config.job.whm.enable_timeline_predictio: Use fight timelines for precise mechanic timing.
config.job.whm.enable_scored_heal_select: Use multi-factor scoring instead of tier-based selection.
config.job.whm.shields_desc: Single-target shields. Applied to tank when HP < 90%.
config.job.whm.party_mitigation_desc: Party-wide mitigation. Used when 3+ injured or avg HP low.
config.job.whm.bell_and_caress_desc: Bell: Ground AoE reactive heal. Caress: AoE shield after Temperance.
config.job.whm.use_with_aoe_heals_desc: Sync Plenary Indulgence with AoE healing for bonus potency.
config.job.whm.holy_desc: Self-centered AoE (8y radius). Use when enemies are stacked.
config.job.whm.misery_desc: 1240p AoE damage (costs 3 Blood Lilies). Use at 3 stacks.
config.job.sch.recitation_target_desc: Which ability to use with Recitation (guaranteed crit, free).
config.job.sch.excogitation_desc: Apply Excogitation proactively at this HP%.
config.job.sch.auto_summon_fairy_desc: Automatically summon Eos if not present.
config.job.sch.enable_fairy_abilities_de: Automatically use Whispering Dawn, Fey Blessing, etc.
config.job.sch.emergency_tactics_desc: Convert next shield to direct healing.
config.job.sch.avoid_sage_shields_desc: Don't apply Galvanize if target has Sage shields.
config.job.sch.stack_reserve_desc: Stacks to keep for emergency healing.
config.job.sch.dump_window_desc: Start dumping stacks when Aetherflow CD is below this.
config.job.sch.dissipation_desc: Sacrifice fairy for 3 Aetherflow + 20% heal boost.
config.job.sch.max_fairy_gauge_desc: Only use when gauge is below this (avoid waste).
config.job.sch.safe_party_hp_desc: Only use when party HP is above this.
config.job.sch.aetherflow_desc: Use Aetherflow when stacks are empty.
config.job.sch.chain_stratagem_desc: +10% crit rate on target for party.
config.job.sch.baneful_impaction_desc: AoE follow-up when Impact Imminent is active.
config.job.ast.aspected_helios_desc: AoE heal + regen. Becomes Helios Conjunction at higher levels.
config.job.ast.essential_dignity_desc: Potency scales with target's missing HP (400-1100).
config.job.ast.essential_dignity_thresho: Lower = more healing potency (scales with missing HP).
config.job.ast.aoe_min_targets_desc: Minimum party members below threshold for AoE heals.
config.job.ast.detonate_threshold_desc: Party average HP to trigger detonation.
config.job.ast.wait_for_giant_dominance_: Wait 10s for star to mature before detonating.
config.job.ast.emergency_threshold_desc: Detonate immature star if HP drops below this.
config.job.ast.horoscope_desc: Delayed AoE heal that can be detonated manually.
config.job.ast.macrocosmos_desc: Absorbs damage taken and heals based on it.
config.job.ast.macrocosmos_threshold_des: Use when party average HP is below this.
config.job.ast.neutral_sect_desc: Boosts healing and adds shield to Aspected spells.
config.job.ast.lady_of_crowns_threshold_: HP threshold to use Lady of Crowns heal.
config.job.ast.astrodyne_min_seals_desc: Wait for this many unique seals (more seals = better buffs).
config.job.ast.synastry_desc: Mirrors 40% of single-target heals to Synastry target.
config.job.ast.lightspeed_desc: Reduces cast times and MP costs.
config.job.ast.lightspeed_save_for_raise: Save for raising dead party members
config.job.ast.dot_refresh_threshold_des: Refresh DoT when this many seconds remain.
config.job.ast.collective_unconscious_wa: Channeled ability - may interrupt other actions.
config.job.sge.auto_apply_kardia_desc: Automatically place Kardia on a party member.
config.job.sge.enable_kardia_swapping_de: Allow swapping Kardia target during combat.
config.job.sge.swap_threshold_desc: Swap to target below this HP if current target is above it.
config.job.sge.soteria_threshold_desc: Kardia target HP to trigger Soteria.
config.job.sge.stack_reserve_desc: Stacks to keep for emergency healing.
config.job.sge.prevent_addersgall_cap_de: Spend stacks proactively to avoid capping.
config.job.sge.cap_prevention_window_des: Start spending when new stack would be granted within this time.
config.job.sge.rhizomata_min_free_slots_: Only use when this many slots are free.
config.job.sge.diagnosis_desc: Basic GCD heal. Generally avoided in favor of oGCDs.
config.job.sge.physis_ii_desc: Free AoE HoT + healing received buff.
config.job.sge.pepsis_threshold_desc: Converts shields to healing when party HP drops below this.
config.job.sge.haima_threshold_desc: Apply to tank when HP below this.
config.job.sge.panhaima_threshold_desc: Use when party average HP below this.
config.job.sge.avoid_overwriting_shields: Don't apply new shields over existing ones.
config.job.sge.krasis_threshold_desc: Apply when target HP below this.
config.job.sge.philosophia_threshold_des: Use when party average HP below this.
config.job.sge.dosis_desc: Casted single-target damage. Triggers Kardia healing.
config.job.tank.shared_description: These settings apply to all tank jobs.
config.job.tank.mitigation_threshold_des: Use mitigation when HP drops below this %.
config.job.tank.use_rampart_on_cooldown_: If disabled, saves major cooldowns for tank busters.
config.job.tank.sheltron_min_gauge_desc: Minimum gauge for Sheltron/TBN/Heart of Stone/etc.
config.job.tank.auto_tank_stance_desc: Enable tank stance when entering combat.
config.job.tank.provoke_delay_desc: Delay before Provoking (prevents accidental provokes during swaps).
config.job.tank.auto_shirk_desc: Shirk to co-tank after tank swap.
config.job.tank.mt_ot_role_desc: Auto detects based on who the enemy is targeting. Override if detection is unreliable.
config.job.pld.sheltron_desc: Sheltron uses shared tank gauge setting.
config.job.pld.detailed_settings_warning: Detailed PLD settings coming in future update.
config.job.pld.clemency_desc1: GCD heal that can be used on self or party members.
config.job.pld.clemency_desc2: Uses MP that could be spent on damage spells.
config.job.pld.clemency_warning: Clemency settings coming in future update.
config.job.war.beast_gauge_desc: Uses shared tank gauge setting for Raw Intuition.
config.job.war.detailed_settings_warning: Detailed WAR settings coming in future update.
config.job.war.gauge_builds: Beast Gauge builds from combo actions.
config.job.war.gauge_spent: Spent on Fell Cleave/Decimate and Raw Intuition.
config.job.war.inner_release_desc1: Burst window with free Fell Cleaves.
config.job.war.beast_gauge_warning: Beast Gauge settings coming in future update.
config.job.drk.tbn_desc2: Grants Dark Arts when shield breaks.
config.job.drk.detailed_settings_warning: Detailed DRK settings coming in future update.
config.job.drk.blood_gauge_desc2: Spent on Bloodspiller/Quietus and Living Shadow.
config.job.drk.mp_desc1: Edge of Shadow/Flood of Shadow costs 3000 MP.
config.job.drk.blood_gauge_warning: Blood Gauge settings coming in future update.
config.job.gnb.heart_of_stone_corundum: Heart of Stone / Heart of Corundum
config.job.gnb.detailed_settings_warning: Detailed GNB settings coming in future update.
config.job.gnb.cartridge_warning: Cartridge settings coming in future update.
config.job.mnk.enable_aoe_rotation_desc: Switch to AoE combo at 3+ enemies.
config.job.mnk.chakra_min_gauge_desc: Minimum Chakra stacks to use spenders
config.job.mnk.brotherhood_hold_time_des: Max seconds to hold waiting for party buffs
config.job.mnk.enable_riddle_of_wind_des: Use Riddle of Wind on cooldown
config.job.mnk.enable_perfect_balance_de: Use Perfect Balance to generate Beast Chakra faster
config.job.mnk.enforce_positionals_desc: Only use positional actions when in correct position
config.job.mnk.allow_positional_loss_des: Continue rotation even if positionals will miss
config.job.sam.enable_shoha_desc: Use Shoha as Meditation gauge spender
config.job.sam.enable_aoe_rotation_desc: Switch to AoE combo at 3+ enemies.
config.job.sam.enable_kyuten_desc: Use Kyuten as AoE Kenki spender
config.job.sam.enable_guren_desc: Use Guren as high-damage AoE Kenki spender
config.job.sam.kenki_overcap_threshold_d: Dump Kenki above this to avoid overcap
config.job.sam.kenki_reserve_for_burst_d: Reserve this much Kenki for Senei/Guren in burst windows
config.job.sam.maintain_higanbana_desc: Keep Higanbana DoT active on target
config.job.sam.higanbana_min_target_hp_d: Skip Higanbana on low HP targets
config.job.sam.ikishoten_hold_time_desc: Max seconds to hold waiting for party buffs
config.job.sam.enable_meikyo_shisui_desc: Use Meikyo Shisui for Sen generation
config.job.sam.use_meikyo_in_burst_desc: Save Meikyo Shisui for burst windows
config.job.sam.enable_burst_pooling_desc: Hold Kenki spenders for party burst windows
config.job.sam.enforce_positionals_desc: Only use positional actions when in correct position
config.job.sam.allow_positional_loss_des: Continue rotation even if positionals will miss
config.job.nin.enable_hellfrog_medium_de: Use Hellfrog Medium as AoE Ninki spender
config.job.nin.enable_aoe_rotation_desc: Switch to AoE combo at 3+ enemies.
config.job.nin.ninki_overcap_threshold_d: Dump Ninki above this to avoid overcap
config.job.nin.kunais_bane_hold_time_des: Max seconds to hold waiting for party buffs
config.job.nin.enable_ten_chi_jin_desc: Use Ten Chi Jin to cast three Ninjutsu
config.job.nin.enable_bunshin_desc: Summon shadow clone for additional attacks
config.job.nin.save_ninki_for_burst_desc: Hold Ninki spenders for burst windows
config.job.nin.enable_burst_pooling_desc: Hold Ninki spenders for party burst windows
config.job.nin.enforce_positionals_desc: Only use positional actions when in correct position
config.job.nin.allow_positional_loss_des: Continue rotation even if positionals will miss
config.job.brd.enable_bloodletter_desc: Use Bloodletter/Rain of Death on cooldown
config.job.brd.apex_arrow_min_gauge_desc: Minimum Soul Voice for Apex Arrow
config.job.brd.enable_aoe_rotation_desc: Switch to AoE combo at 3+ enemies.
config.job.brd.enable_song_rotation_desc: Automatically rotate through Wanderer's Minuet, Mage's Ballad, and Army's Paeon
config.job.brd.use_pitch_perfect_early_d: Use at 2 stacks if song is ending
config.job.brd.pitch_perfect_early_thres: Seconds remaining on song to use Pitch Perfect early
config.job.brd.enable_iron_jaws_desc: Use Iron Jaws to refresh DoTs
config.job.brd.enable_barrage_desc: Use Barrage with Refulgent Arrow procs
config.job.brd.radiant_finale_min_coda_d: Minimum Coda count for Radiant Finale
config.job.brd.buff_hold_time_desc: Max seconds to hold waiting for party buffs
config.job.brd.enable_burst_pooling_desc: Pool Soul Voice gauge for burst windows
config.job.brd.use_apex_during_burst_des: Use Apex Arrow at 50+ during burst windows
config.job.brd.enable_natures_minne_desc: Use Nature's Minne for party healing support
config.job.brd.enable_wardens_paean_desc: Use Warden's Paean for cleansing debuffs
config.job.mch.enable_excavator_desc: Use Excavator follow-up after Chain Saw
config.job.mch.enable_full_metal_field_d: Use Full Metal Field as gauge spender
config.job.mch.enable_gauss_ricochet_des: Use Gauss Round and Ricochet on charges
config.job.mch.enable_aoe_rotation_desc: Switch to AoE combo at 3+ enemies.
config.job.mch.heat_overcap_threshold_de: Dump Heat above this to avoid overcap
config.job.mch.save_heat_for_wildfire_de: Hold Heat gauge for Wildfire windows
config.job.mch.battery_overcap_threshold: Summon Queen above this to avoid overcap
config.job.mch.enable_hypercharge_desc: Enter Hypercharge when Heat gauge is full
config.job.mch.enable_auto_crossbow_desc: Use Auto Crossbow during AoE Hypercharge
config.job.mch.enable_automaton_queen_de: Summon Automaton Queen when Battery is ready
config.job.mch.enable_queen_overdrive_de: Use Queen Overdrive to boost burst damage
config.job.mch.save_battery_for_burst_de: Hold Battery gauge for burst windows
config.job.mch.enable_barrel_stabilizer_: Use Barrel Stabilizer to generate Heat
config.job.mch.enable_reassemble_desc: Use Reassemble for guaranteed critical hits
config.job.mch.wildfire_hold_time_desc: Max seconds to hold waiting for party buffs
config.job.mch.enable_burst_pooling_desc: Hold Heat gauge for party burst windows
config.job.dnc.enable_last_dance_desc: Use Last Dance when ready before the buff expires
config.job.dnc.enable_fan_dance_iv_desc: Use Fan Dance IV after Flourish procs Fourfold
config.job.dnc.enable_flourish_desc: Use Flourish on cooldown to generate procs
config.job.dnc.esprit_overcap_threshold_: Use Saber Dance above this Esprit to avoid overcap
config.job.dnc.save_esprit_for_burst_des: Hold Esprit gauge for burst windows
config.job.dnc.feather_overcap_threshold: Use Fan Dance above this count to avoid overcap
config.job.dnc.enable_devilment_after_te: Delay Devilment to use inside Technical Finish window
config.job.dnc.enable_burst_pooling_desc: Pool Esprit and Feathers for party burst windows
config.job.dnc.partner_selection_mode_de: How to choose your Dance Partner
config.job.dnc.auto_repartner_desc: Automatically re-assign Dance Partner when your partner dies or leaves
config.job.dnc.enable_curing_waltz_desc: Use Curing Waltz for party healing support
config.job.dnc.enable_shield_samba_desc: Use Shield Samba to mitigate incoming damage
config.job.vpr.enable_uncoiled_fury_desc: Use Uncoiled Fury to spend Rattling Coils
config.job.vpr.enable_generation_abiliti: Use Twinfang and Twinblood generation abilities
config.job.vpr.maintain_venoms_desc: Reapply venom buffs before they expire
config.job.vpr.rattling_coil_min_stacks_: Minimum Rattling Coil stacks before spending with Uncoiled Fury
config.job.vpr.save_rattling_coil_for_bu: Hold Rattling Coil stacks for burst windows
config.job.vpr.enable_aoe_rotation_desc: Switch to AoE combo at 3+ enemies.
config.job.vpr.enable_reawaken_desc: Use Reawaken when Anguine Tribute is ready
config.job.vpr.enable_ouroboros_desc: Use Ouroboros to finish the Reawaken sequence
config.job.vpr.save_anguine_for_burst_de: Hold Anguine Tribute for burst windows
config.job.vpr.serpents_ire_hold_time_de: Max seconds to hold waiting for party buffs
config.job.vpr.enforce_positionals_desc: Only use positional actions when in correct position
config.job.vpr.enable_slither_desc: Use Slither as a gap closer when out of melee range
config.job.rpr.enable_harvest_moon_desc: Use Harvest Moon as a ranged attack when out of melee range
config.job.rpr.enable_plentiful_harvest_: Use Plentiful Harvest after Arcane Circle fades
config.job.rpr.enable_aoe_rotation_desc: Switch to AoE combo at 3+ enemies.

config.job.rpr.save_shroud_for_burst_des: Hold Shroud gauge for burst windows
config.job.rpr.enable_gluttony_desc: Use Gluttony on cooldown to generate Soul Reavers
config.job.rpr.enable_avatar_summon_desc: Summon Immortal Sacrifice stacks via Enshroud
config.job.rpr.alternate_gibbet_gallows_: Automatically alternate between Gibbet and Gallows based on position

config.job.pct.enable_hammer_motif_desc: Use Hammer Motif (enables Hammer Stamp combo)
config.job.pct.enable_starry_sky_motif_d: Use Starry Sky Motif (enables Starry Muse and Star Prism)
analytics.not_in_combat: Not in combat. Metrics will appear when combat starts.
analytics.no_cooldowns: No cooldowns tracked for this job.
analytics.complete_combat: Complete a combat encounter to see analysis.
analytics.unexplained_tooltip: GCD ready with no apparent reason for delay
analytics.tip_unexplained: Tip: {0}s of unexplained downtime. Try to always be casting or weaving oGCDs.
analytics.tip_movement: Tip: Movement caused most downtime. Use instant casts or slidecast during movement.
analytics.need_sessions_for_trends: Need at least 3 sessions for trends ({0} recorded).
analytics.build_history: Complete combat encounters to build history.
analytics.fflogs_intro: To use FFLogs integration, you need to create an API client on FFLogs.
analytics.character_binding_intro: Enter your character information to view FFLogs rankings.
analytics.no_rankings_data: No rankings data available. Click Refresh to load.
training.enable_training_mode_tooltip: When enabled, captures and explains rotation decisions in real-time.
training.show_coaching_hints_tooltip: Show real-time hints during combat for struggling concepts.
training.personality_tooltip:
Encouraging: Positive, supportive feedback
Analytical: Data-focused, objective feedback
Strict: Direct, high-standards feedback
Silent: Minimal feedback, critical only
training.validation_tooltip_format:
Optimal decision rate: {0}
✓ Optimal | ≈ Acceptable | ✗ Suboptimal
training.skill_level_tooltip:
Score: {0}/100
Explanation verbosity adapts to your skill level.
training.adaptive_tooltip_format: Verbosity adjusted from {0} to {1} based on your skill level.
training.no_decisions_yet: No decisions yet. Enter combat to see explanations.
training.based_on_both: Based on fight performance and mastery data:
training.based_on_performance: Based on your recent fight performance:
training.clear_dismissed_tooltip: Allow dismissed recommendations to appear again.
training.enable_recommendations_tooltip: When enabled, suggests lessons based on fight performance issues.
training.max_recommendations_tooltip: Maximum number of recommendations to show.
training.enable_above: Enable them above to get personalized lesson suggestions.
training.complete_for_recs: Complete a fight to receive lesson suggestions based on your performance, or generate suggestions from your mastery data below.
training.recs_tip: Tip: Recommendations are generated after fights based on detected issues, or from concepts you're struggling with.
training.generate_tooltip: Generate lesson recommendations based on concepts you're struggling with for this job.
training.complete_tooltip: Mark this lesson as completed and remove from recommendations.
training.dismiss_tooltip: Hide this recommendation. Use 'Clear Dismissed' to show it again.
training.no_lessons_available: No lessons available for this job.
training.select_lesson_to_view: Select a lesson to view details.
training.complete_prerequisites: Complete the prerequisite lessons to unlock this content.
training.mark_incomplete_tooltip: Remove completion status from this lesson.
training.mark_complete_tooltip: Mark this lesson as completed. This will also mark all concepts as learned.
training.no_quizzes_available: No quizzes available for this job.
training.quiz_instructions: Complete quizzes to test your understanding of each lesson. Answer 4 out of 5 questions correctly to pass.
training.question: QUESTION:
training.adaptive_verbosity_tooltip:
When enabled, explanation verbosity automatically adjusts based on your skill level:
- Beginners see detailed explanations for all decisions
- Intermediate players see normal detail, with extra detail for unfamiliar concepts
- Advanced players see minimal detail, except for new or critical decisions
training.skill_override_tooltip:
Override the detected skill level:
- Auto-detect: Uses quiz and lesson progress to determine level
- Beginner/Intermediate/Advanced: Force a specific level
training.open_lesson_tooltip: Open the lesson covering this concept
training.play_to_build_mastery: Play with Training Mode enabled to build mastery data.
training.enable_adaptive_to_see_skills: Enable adaptive explanations above to see skill levels.
training.no_progress_yet: No progress yet. Complete lessons and quizzes to see your skill levels.
training.go_to_lessons_tab: Go to the Lessons tab to get started!
training.other_jobs_no_progress: {0} other jobs with no progress yet.
training.concept_mastery_tooltip: Success rate when applying concepts in combat
training.engagement_penalty: Note: -25% penalty applied (lessons completed without quizzes)
training.engagement_penalty_tooltip: Take quizzes to validate your understanding and remove this penalty.
training.developing_tooltip: These concepts need at least 10 opportunities before mastery can be evaluated.
training.play_more_to_build_mastery: Play more to build mastery data!
training.retention_tooltip:
Track how well you remember concepts over time.
Concepts decay without practice - review suggested when retention drops below 40%.
training.last_practiced_tooltip:
Last practiced: {0} days ago
Open the lesson to refresh your knowledge.
training.retention_declining_tooltip:
Retention declining.
Review recommended to maintain knowledge.

config.language.select_desc: Select your preferred language. Auto uses the game client language.
DrawHelper.EnableDrawingDisabledHint: Drawing is disabled. Enable it to use these settings.
DrawHelper.UsePictomancyTooltip: Use the Pictomancy plugin for enhanced rendering if available.
config.timeline.enable_predictions_desc: Use fight timelines for precise mechanic timing (DSU/TOP/FRU and any future zones).
config.timeline.confidence_threshold_des: Minimum confidence required before trusting timeline predictions. Higher = more conservative.
config.timeline.enable_mechanic_aware_ca: Stop hardcast damage spells when a raidwide or tank buster will hit before the cast completes. Applies to all roles.
config.job.healer_shared.timeline_master: Timeline master toggles now live in Shared > Timeline Integration.
